ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISCHANGED( PR_Cost_Price_GST_exc__c ) && NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Draft')) && NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Submitted')) && NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Purchasing Review')) && NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Approver Review')) && NOT( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'For Ordering') && (PO_Status__c = 'Sent to Supplier' || PO_Status__c = 'Partially Fulfilled') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are no longer allowed to edit PR Cost Price.
